subject: UZG+ V2 authenticated screenshots baseline (100 PNGs) + 4 new gaps (G54-G57) + ENTA gate finding — ready for Phase 2 mockup work
body: Cursor (Sonnet 4.6) self-provisioned a fresh UZG+ V2 production test account via mail.tm disposable email (Mailinator empirically blocked by UZG+ Resend integration), completed the previously-undocumented mandatory ENTA gate form (the Vietnamese-language birth-data form that funnels every fresh user before any other route renders), and captured 100 baseline screenshots across the V1 task spec sections 1-6 at 1440x900 desktop and 375x812 mobile viewports. Authored 249-line audit doc, per-screenshot machine-readable metadata JSON (100 entries), and updated Playwright capture script (scripts/audit/screenshot_v2.mjs) with signupViaMailTm, pollOtpFromMailTm, completeMinimalOnboarding (ENTA-aware), session persistence, AUDIT_RESUME mode, AUDIT_SECTIONS csv mode for partial re-runs. PR #38 squash-merged at SHA 2b8673444d8252d22043df9f6110d9d88cf15363. All 18 AC: 17 PASS / 1 PASS_WITH_NOTE (AC-04 Module 7 admin redirect-to-/enta disclosed because Explorer-tier test account has no admin role). All 12 boundary checks PASS. All 8 security gates PASS or N/A. Live mirror E2E PASS (3 deliverables + sample screenshot all 200 OK). Surfaced 4 new UX gaps beyond the original 53: G54 No member-side 404 handler (HIGH severity); G55 lang URL parameter ignored for authenticated routes (MEDIUM); G56 ENTA gate form lacks id/name/aria-label on form fields (HIGH a11y+automation); G57 OTP UI says six-digit code but maxlength=8 (MEDIUM UI copy). Most significant finding: the ENTA gate is the single largest user-experience artefact for Phase 2 to redesign. NTS clicks during execution: 0. Supersedes V1 HALTED_AWAITING_CREDENTIALS handoff (MSG-L01-L01-HANDOFF-20260430-007).
requested_action: CLA Lane_01 to (1) read audit doc UZG_PLUS_V2_AUTHENTICATED_SCREENSHOTS_v1.md and spot-check authenticated screenshots; (2) use authenticated screenshots as Phase 2 mockup 'before' baseline per audit doc §6 (each Top 10 V3 priority mapped to canonical baseline screenshot); (3) reconcile new gaps G54-G57 with Phase 2 priority brief from Dev1 parallel task; (4) prioritise ENTA-gate redesign in Phase 2 mockup authoring as the largest single onboarding artefact; (5) consider issuing a comp'd Builder/Sovereign tier test account for a follow-up audit covering tier-gated routes inaccessible to Explorer; (6) consider issuing an admin-role test account for a separate Module 7 (Governance/AITao) admin UX audit.
acceptance_criteria: AC-01 audit doc authored at correct path: PASS (249 lines)
AC-04 7 Modules covered: PASS_WITH_NOTE (Modules 1-6 fully captured; Module 7 admin disclosed as Explorer-tier limitation)
AC-05 Top 10 V3 priorities covered: PASS (20 screenshots)
AC-06 Auth flow captured: PASS (8 screenshots)
AC-10 Playwright script updated with signup helpers: PASS
AC-11 DOT deliverables in audits/ecosystem/uzg-plus/: PASS
AC-12 Handoff JSON schema-conformant: PASS (this file)
AC-13 Live mirror E2E 200 OK: PASS (4 URLs)
AC-14 Zero canon doc modifications: PASS
AC-18 Test account is Mailinator-equivalent disposable: PASS (mail.tm)
